languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

languages.text: "За тем, что он собрал у себя в своем карманном музее, наверняка охотится половина галактики... и не только Империум. Если нам повезет еще раз попасть туда, я бы... оценила возможность лишить ксеноса пары-тройки артефактов".

"Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."
languages.original_text: "За тем, что он собрал у себя в своем карманном музее, наверняка охотится половина галактики... и не только Империум. Если нам повезет еще раз попасть туда, я бы... оценила возможность лишить ксеноса пары-тройки артефактов".

traits.locale_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

"Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

"Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

languages.text: 「銀河の半分が、彼のポケット博物館に集めたものを狙っているに違いない…帝国内だけの話ではない。もし幸運にも、再びその場所へたどり着くことができれば、私は…その異星人を、2、3の遺物から剥ぎ取る機会を、喜んで受け入れるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

traits.locale_text: 「銀河の半分が、彼のポケット博物館に集めたものを狙っているに違いない…帝国内だけの話ではない。もし幸運にも、再びその場所へたどり着くことができれば、私は…その異星人を、2、3の遺物から剥ぎ取る機会を、喜んで受け入れるだろう。」

languages.text: « La moitié de la galaxie doit convoiter ce qu'il a amassé dans son petit musée... et je ne parle pas seulement de l'Imperium. Si nous avons la chance d'y retourner un jour... j'aimerais beaucoup en profiter pour déposséder ce xénos d'un ou deux artefacts. »
languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

traits.locale_text: « La moitié de la galaxie doit convoiter ce qu'il a amassé dans son petit musée... et je ne parle pas seulement de l'Imperium. Si nous avons la chance d'y retourner un jour... j'aimerais beaucoup en profiter pour déposséder ce xénos d'un ou deux artefacts. »

languages.text: "Die halbe Galaxis muss hinter den Exponaten seines Taschenmuseums her sein ... und ich meine damit nicht nur das Imperium. Wenn wir das Glück haben, dorthin zurückzufinden ... würde ich diesen Xenos gerne um das eine oder andere Artefakt erleichtern."
languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

traits.locale_text: "Die halbe Galaxis muss hinter den Exponaten seines Taschenmuseums her sein ... und ich meine damit nicht nur das Imperium. Wenn wir das Glück haben, dorthin zurückzufinden ... würde ich diesen Xenos gerne um das eine oder andere Artefakt erleichtern."

languages.text: "Galaksinin yarısı onun cebindeki müzesinde topladıklarının peşinde olmalı... Sadece İmparatorluk'tan bahsetmiyorum. Eğer yolumuz tekrar oraya çıkacak kadar şanslı olursak ben... O zenoyu bir iki eserden etme fırsatından memnuniyet duyarım."
languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

traits.locale_text: "Galaksinin yarısı onun cebindeki müzesinde topladıklarının peşinde olmalı... Sadece İmparatorluk'tan bahsetmiyorum. Eğer yolumuz tekrar oraya çıkacak kadar şanslı olursak ben... O zenoyu bir iki eserden etme fırsatından memnuniyet duyarım."

languages.text: «Media galaxia debe de estar buscando lo que guarda en su museo... y no me refiero únicamente al Imperium. Si tenemos suerte y averiguamos cómo volver... me gustaría tener ocasión de despojar a ese xenos de algún que otro artefacto».
languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

traits.locale_text: «Media galaxia debe de estar buscando lo que guarda en su museo... y no me refiero únicamente al Imperium. Si tenemos suerte y averiguamos cómo volver... me gustaría tener ocasión de despojar a ese xenos de algún que otro artefacto».

languages.text: “半个银河系恐怕都在觊觎他那袖珍博物馆里的收藏……我说的可不只是帝国这边。要是咱们运气够好能再摸进去，我倒挺想……从那个异形手里顺走一两件古董。”
languages.original_text: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."

traits.locale_text: “半个银河系恐怕都在觊觎他那袖珍博物馆里的收藏……我说的可不只是帝国这边。要是咱们运气够好能再摸进去，我倒挺想……从那个异形手里顺走一两件古董。”
